creator: levent@corehack.org
text:
--dDRMvlgZJXvWKvBx
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Disposition: inline

Hi Mark!

I already made a ftelnetd.shar and tested everything. No problems were
detected.

best regards,
levent

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/
#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist
#
echo c - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	ftelnetd
X# Date created:        11 March 2007
X# Whom:                miwi
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X
XPORTNAME=		ftelnetd
XPORTVERSION=	0.0.2
XCATEGORIES=		net
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.de.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/packages/net/
X
XMAINTAINER=		miwi@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=			A small server faking various telnet daemons
X
XUSE_GMAKE=		YES
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr'
Xfake telnet daemon (ftelnetd)
X-----------------------------
Xftelnetd is a small server faking various telnet daemons,
Xlogging all received logins to a file and doing more actions.
X
XWWW: http://www.corehack.org/
END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo'
XMD5 (ftelnetd-0.0.2.tar.gz) = b616c7d15572c9d498c9d249ff7e2eeb
XSHA256 (ftelnetd-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 1d0a7fd44b79d57fedd5320dd137c11f577785625839602aca0b9c76ceb279d5
XSIZE (ftelnetd-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 8166
END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist'
Xsbin/ftelnetd
END-of-/usr/ports/net/ftelnetd/pkg-plist
exit

>Unformatted:
